ab: duru ma kɨkɨ késédeme swa pésu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: nakuni! nngupia su na pésu?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: maimuru kɨkɨ emɨcɨ na pésu duru ma kɨkɨ késédeme swa na pésu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: imɨcɨ kɨkɨ na pésu!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: maimuru kɨkɨ emɨcɨ na pésu duru ma kɨkɨ késédeme swa na pésu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: éni, iku késdama su kwa pésu ésévérela musu kwa.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: duru makɨkɨ késédeme swa na kipingila?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: iyo, mra ngikemani.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: duru ma kɨkɨ késédeme sulatesula?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: pakésdame kɨkɨ Gagara nga.
en: B: I lent it to Gagara.

ab: pkésamala kwa rengele su ni?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: iyo, makasi kusianga ka sovriya kwa.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: udalenga, imɨcɨ kɨkɨ na thɨkebe pkésésada mala kwa thɨkebe su ni?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: sesakwa na thɨkebe taterese rhakebe.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: kené ka amani pakésédama su kwa sulate sévélé makɨ swa.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: aci ku pakedredre ma su kucnglela na silate mia musobaka kwa.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: nugene na sovilrili swa na pésu.
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: ipilringo, akina ikédra swa pésu.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: nugenenga na sovilri su kwa pésu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: kusianga ka sévélé makɨ swa.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: nugenenga na sovilri su kwa sulate?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ikemani na osévélénga swa kusia?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: kené ingpicu ka pakésdama ni swa ki kanau?
en: A: Did Kanau lend you this pen?

ab: iyo, sesa ka késdamalidria.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kené ingpicu ka késdama su dria Kanava?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kanava?

ab: éni, kené ka alangra dra nina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: tédra nga na tumusu, mua késdeme Milrnu na ngitiki ci na tumasu.
en: A: We're out of salt, go borrow some from Panay.

ab: iyo, nuwa kɨkɨ késédeme.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: mua tilila mumu nina sovlria kwa pésu mia.
en: B: Go tell Panay to give me back my money. *[Panay] Please change the name to an ethnic woman.

ab: pidra na pésu ku pusiakia ni swa?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
